description: As a professional astronomer at Mauna Kea Observatory (19.8207° N, 155.4681° W, 4207m altitude), prepare a deep-sky observation of the Andromeda Galaxy (M31) for January 15, 2025, at 06:00 UTC. The observation requires professional viewing conditions with atmosphere and terrain disabled and constellation overlays active. Center and zoom the view on M31 to show its structure.

metadata.data_source: NASA/IPAC Extragalactic Database (NED), IAU Minor Planet Center observatory codes
